title: Learn 80% of Claude Cowork in Under 20 Minutes
summary: Claude Cowork is Anthropic's desktop application that extends Claude into a full productivity system with local file access, persistent memory, tools and connectors, skills, projects, and scheduled task automation. The video tutorial covers seven core capabilities for automating workflows like expense reports and inbox triage.
